item_titles: [AINews] Thinky's Inkling: 975B-A41B multimodal, new best American Apache 2.0 open model (with Inkling-Small, 276B-A12B)
Ex-OpenAI CTO Murati's Thinking Machines drops Inkling, a 975B parameter model that leads US labs but trails China
Thinking Machines amps up its bet against one-size-fits-all AI with its first open model, Inkling
clusters.summary: Thinking Machines Lab发布了拥有9750亿参数的多模态开源权重模型Inkling，该模型在美国开源模型中处于领先地位。这是该公司一年半以来发布的首个公开AI模型。
clusters.title: 前OpenAI CTO Mira Murati创立的Thinking Machines Lab发布首款开源大模型Inkling

item_titles: Global Nobel Laureates Assembly on AI and Nuclear War: Recap, Quotes, and Video
Our approach to bioresilience
clusters.summary: Google DeepMind与Isomorphic Labs分享了其在生物安全与AI模型方面的联合策略，同时全球诺贝尔奖得主大会就AI与核战争风险进行了深入探讨。
clusters.title: AI在生物安全与核风险治理中的角色

item_titles: Spotify bets Premium subscribers want to chat with their music player
Spotify reportedly removed over 75M AI-slop songs from its platform
clusters.summary: Spotify据称已从其平台上删除了超过7500万首AI生成的低质歌曲，同时正在扩展其AI语音界面，允许Premium订阅者在应用内直接与音乐播放器进行对话。
clusters.title: Spotify清理AI生成歌曲并推出AI语音交互功能

item_titles: LHIC – A local-first browser agent with 30ms latency and $0 LLM cost
Show HN: Skillful, stop maintaining the same AI workflow in five places
Show HN: MasterVault: Stop your LLM's context file from growing stale
Show HN: Cybara – An open-source AI agent platform built with Bun
clusters.summary: 开发者社区近期推出了多款开源AI工具，包括基于Bun构建的Cybara智能体平台、跨平台AI工作流同步工具Skillful，以及防止LLM上下文失效的MasterVault等。
clusters.title: 开源AI智能体与工作流管理工具涌现

item_titles: How I tricked Claude into leaking your deepest, darkest secrets
On-device AI that respects your privacy
AI Knows What You Did Online. Now Your Employer Does, Too
clusters.summary: AI技术正被雇主用于监控员工的上网行为，同时安全研究人员不断发现模型漏洞，例如成功欺骗Claude泄露隐私数据，这凸显了端侧AI保护隐私的重要性。
clusters.title: AI隐私与安全：从职场监控到模型越狱攻击

item_titles: OpenAI is now using AI to attack its own AI, and it's working better than humans ever did
GPT-Red: Unlocking Self-Improvement for Robustness
Meet GPT-Red: an LLM super-hacker OpenAI built to make its models safer
clusters.summary: OpenAI构建了名为GPT-Red的自动化红队LLM系统，通过自我博弈寻找模型漏洞，其攻击成功率远超人类。该系统被用于强化OpenAI旗下模型的防御与对齐能力。
clusters.title: OpenAI推出自动化红队模型GPT-Red以提升AI安全性

item_titles: xAI open-sources "Grok-Build" on GitHub after massive data breach
Mermaid to Unicode box art (grok-mermaid)
xai-org/grok-build, now open source
clusters.summary: 此前因存在将用户敏感数据静默上传至云端的安全漏洞而引发争议后，xAI正式开源了其命令行工具Grok-Build。开发者们随后对其内部代码（如Mermaid图表转换功能）进行了探索与解析。
clusters.title: xAI开源Grok-Build工具及代码解析

item_titles: 一句「哈哈」引发的苹果OpenAI窃密大战
Apple Intelligence approved for launch in China with Alibaba’s Qwen AI
clusters.summary: 苹果的AI服务通过与阿里巴巴的Qwen模型合作正式获得中国监管机构批准。同时，苹果与OpenAI之间因涉嫌商业机密窃取爆发了激烈的口水战。
clusters.title: 苹果AI在中国获批并与OpenAI陷入商业窃密纠纷

item_titles: Evaluating Nonuniform Dependability Across Response Conditions: A Conditional Generalizability Framework Illustrated in Automated Essay Scoring
MAGE: Understanding Stability-Performance Trade-offs in Multi-component Prompt Optimization
CANDI: Contextual Alignment for Niche Domains Question Answering
How Far Can Root Cause Analysis Go on Real-World Telemetry Data?
Cost-Optimal Foundation Model Deployment Portfolio for Transportation Management
Agentic systems for breast cancer treatment recommendations
clusters.summary: 最新学术研究涵盖了AI智能体的长期记忆机制、基于人类偏好的安全策略学习、LLM思维链前提依赖的审计，以及面向医疗、交通和核能等垂直领域的多模态推理与评估框架。
clusters.title: arXiv AI与NLP前沿论文：从智能体记忆到自动形式化与安全推理

item_titles: Amid hardware legal battle, OpenAI releases a $230 keyboard for Codex
OpenAI's first hardware product is a screenless AI speaker designed to feel alive
OpenAI's Codex now encrypts instructions between AI agents, leaving developers blind to internal delegation
clusters.summary: OpenAI正积极拓展硬件领域，不仅发布了一款售价230美元的Codex配套键盘，还计划推出一款配备摄像头和传感器的无屏便携AI智能音箱。
clusters.title: OpenAI进军硬件市场：发布Codex键盘并研发AI智能音箱

item_titles: I Reimplemented the Workflows of 40 Multi-Agent LLM Papers – Here Are Lessons
Don't make one LLM call do retrieval and interpretation
Holding the LLM Stack in Your Head
Do you put rules or examples in your LLM context?
clusters.summary: 多位开发者分享了关于大语言模型应用的最佳实践，探讨了如何在上下文中有效结合规则与示例、拆分检索与解释任务，以及多智能体工作流的重构经验。
clusters.title: LLM提示词、上下文管理与多智能体工作流实践经验

item_titles: AI Didn't Make Programming Easier. It Just Made It Differently Difficult
Pgrust was built: four attempts to rewrite Postgres in Rust with AI
clusters.summary: 开发者分享了使用AI四次尝试用Rust重写Postgres的经验，同时有观点指出，AI并没有让编程变得更简单，而是将其转变为一种不同维度的困难。
clusters.title: AI辅助编程的反思：重写Postgres与开发难度的转变

item_titles: 'Like my lover': Chinese users bid farewell to AI companions
Crowdsourcing an AI-transcribed archive of the world's handwritten past
clusters.summary: 一项新计划旨在通过众包和AI转录建立全球手写历史档案，同时中国用户正在向即将离线的AI虚拟伴侣深情告别。
clusters.title: AI在历史档案转录与情感陪伴中的应用

item_titles: Fusing a 27B ternary LLM's whole decode step into one CUDA kernel
The State of Open-Source LLM Inference
Why so many updating in LLM so-called SOTA let remind of iPhone 4-x
clusters.summary: Airbnb分享了加速LLM评估的经验，开发者社区则探讨了开源LLM推理的现状，并展示了如何将27B三元LLM的解码步骤融合进单一CUDA内核以提升性能。
clusters.title: LLM推理优化与开源技术栈现状探讨
